name: coflow
description: A Codex-driven media canvas for image and video generation/editing from whiteboard selection, frames, and annotations.

interface.shortDescription: Open a canvas, generate or edit images/videos from frames and annotations, and write results back with lineage.
interface.longDescription: CoFlow keeps the whiteboard as visual context and writeback surface. Codex skills decide image/video/3D workflow modes, call real providers, and insert results back onto the canvas with local assets, lineage, and metadata.
defaultPrompt: View or change CoFlow provider/model defaults.
Generate or edit selected canvas media.
